excluded.reason: Block displays events in a vertical stack, not a carousel. No Swiper, no navigation, no pagination.
Block is always dark. No light/dark toggle. Dark mode is not optional.
No pagination - events are limited by postsLimit attribute, displayed all at once vertically.
No load more - all queried events render at once.
Block uses dynamic query, not inner blocks.

extra.description: Verify future events are sorted ASC (closest event first) and past events are sorted DESC (most recent first)
Verify _EventStartDate meta is used for date display and filtering, not post_date
Verify venue name displays correctly from _EventVenueID (tribe_venue post type)
Verify date badge shows correct day-of-week, day number, and month/year from _EventStartDate
Verify buttonLabel attribute text appears on each event card CTA
Verify event card links to correct event permalink
Verify multiple events stack vertically with consistent gap
Verify hideIfEmpty hides entire section when no events match query
Verify manual mode respects post__in ordering
Verify taxonomy filters (tribe_events_cat, post_tag) work in automatic mode
Verify card image/content halves are side-by-side on desktop and stacked on mobile
Verify dark pattern background covers the full container area including ThemeHeading
